## Summary / 概述
Brief description of changes.

## Type / 类型
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other

## Test Plan / 测试计划
How was this tested?

## Checklist / 检查清单
- [ ] SKILL.md <= 200 lines
- [ ] Reference files <= 80 lines each
- [ ] No hardcoded `.claude/` paths (use platform-adaptive language)
- [ ] Bilingual labels (Chinese + English) on all new user-facing text
- [ ] `python scripts/install.py --dry-run` passes
- [ ] Smoke tests pass for changed modules
